subcodes.first_line: O pure and sanctified souls! When Khudádád Rashíd reached the exalted mansion, he was seized with intense emotion and remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس طیبه طاهره جناب خداداد رشید چون بقصر مشید رسید غلیان شدید یافت و بیاد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @education of children; moral education
